title: Crispy Norwegian Herbs Crumble
description: A savory and crispy dish featuring minced garlic and herbs, perfect for a nostalgic breakfast or snack. This recipe is vegan-friendly and utilizes sous-vide cooking.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together garlic, oregano, thyme, and chopped chives.
Add sunflower oil and vegetable broth concentrate. Mix well until fully combined.
Place mixture in a ziplock bag and seal, ensuring there are no air pockets. Place in sous-vide for 30 minutes.
Remove from machine and let cool slightly to room temperature.
In a separate bowl, mix together almond flour and baking powder.
Slowly add the cooled herb oil mixture into the dry ingredients while mixing with a spatula until fully combined.
Place crumble onto a non-stick surface and cook in a 400°F oven for 12 minutes or until golden brown on top.
